claim: YOLO demand router schema readiness already blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function converts evidence agent results into blockers based on recommendation, verdict, status, and missing array.
evidence.why: This is the core blocking logic that processes evidence agent outputs.

evidence.summary: If missing array has items, pushes EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker with role and missing items list.
evidence.why: This is the exact code path that implements missing evidence blocking.

evidence.summary: If recommendation is clarify/blocked/block, verdict is blocked/block/fail/failed, or status is blocked/failed/error, pushes appropriate blocker code.
evidence.why: This implements clarify, block, and failed status blocking.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness loops through all evidence agent results and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each result, accumulating blockers.
evidence.why: This shows how evidence agent results are processed and converted to blockers.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness.
evidence.why: This confirms that blockers from evidence agent results directly control PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' confirms missing array items and recommendation=clarify both create blockers.
evidence.why: This is test evidence that the blocking behavior works as specified.

evidence.summary: Test assertions verify prd_ready=false and both EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers are present.
evidence.why: This is test evidence that blockers correctly prevent PRD readiness.

risks: If the current implementation already works as specified, the demand may be based on a misunderstanding of existing code behavior.

result.notes: The demand router implementation already blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status. The evidenceResultBlockingIssues function (lines 481-511) implements this blocking logic, and inspectDemandPrdReadiness (line 756) sets prd_ready to blockers.length === 0. Test evidence confirms this behavior works correctly. Clarify why this demand believes blocking is not already implemented.
